ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Everest Industries' subsidiary has cancelled a significant Rs. 138 crore CAPEX project for a new Fibre Cement Boards plant in Assam, citing re-assessed feasibility and business considerations. While the company states this decision will not have an adverse financial impact, it entails surrendering land for which Rs. 10.90 crore was already invested, raising questions about the recoverability of this prior expenditure and the broader strategic implications of the project's abrupt termination.
